description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the fedora Docker image and a single build stage. Add a before_script that installs cmake, clang, clang-tools-extra, gsl-devel, boost-devel, make and automake via dnf. Define a check job in the build stage that runs "cmake .", then "make", then runs "clang-check -analyze -extra-arg -Xclang -extra-arg -analyzer-output=text -extra-arg -std=c++14 -extra-arg -Wall src/*.cpp" and finally "clang-tidy src/*.cpp". Define a make job also in the build stage that runs "cmake ." and "make". No caches, artifacts, services, or conditional rules are needed.
